R Ashwin Urges Role Clarity for Washington Sundar

Dec 5, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

R Ashwin Emphasises Role Clarity for Nitish Reddy

After India’s second ODI vs South Africa, R Ashwin stressed that Washington Sundar’s fluctuating batting positions and limited bowling overs were harming his development. He suggested that emerging all-rounders like Nitish Reddy must be given a clear, consistent role to build confidence and perform effectively.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here: 👉 R Ashwin Urges Role Clarity for Washington Sundar
